createProject.repoRequired: Please enter a Git repository URL or choose a local repository.

createProject.capabilityHint: All swarm capabilities are enabled by default. Adjust before creating the project.
createProject.effectivePlanHint: Based on current toggles and edits, project creation will apply the following outputs.
createProject.effectivePlanTemplateUnsupported: Template repository cloning is not implemented yet. Source information is shown only.
createProject.skillsHubCheckFailed: Skills Hub status check failed. Missing skills may not be detected.
createProject.missingSkillsTitle: The following skills are not installed locally
createProject.missingSkillsHint: Install them in Settings first to avoid missing sync into .opencode/skills.
createProject.missingSkillsBeforeCreate: Install missing skills before creating the project

createTaskModal.title: Create New Task
createTaskModal.normalTaskHint: Create and develop on an isolated branch
createTaskModal.directTaskNoticeDesc: No Worktree will be created. The task runs directly on the selected branch. Suitable for config updates (like .opencode) and Git maintenance operations (conflict resolution, rebase).
createTaskModal.taskDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to accomplish...
createTaskModal.imagesHint: Optional. Uploaded images will be passed to the Agent during execution
createTaskModal.selectSwarmPlaceholder: Select swarm, type / to browse available swarms...
createTaskModal.projectNoSwarmPrefix: This project has no swarm binding yet, please
createTaskModal.executeImmediatelyHint: When disabled, the task enters To Do column
createTaskModal.directTaskBranchHint: Direct tasks require a target branch
createTaskModal.repoPathNotConfigured: Repository path is not configured. Default location will be used: <repo>/.hive-worktrees/

about.title: HiveLaunch
about.subtitle: A local-first AI development platform
about.mission: Pick a template, dispatch tasks, and ship code with less setup overhead.
about.capabilityScaffold: Scenario scaffolding: bootstrap project structure and AI rules quickly
about.capabilityKanban: Kanban execution: each card maps to a real AI execution run
about.capabilitySwarm: Swarm config: manage Agents, Skills, and MCP in one place
about.capabilityRemote: Remote access: track progress across desktop and mobile
about.licensePrimary: The main project uses a custom commercial license: free for personal non-commercial use; commercial use requires authorization.
about.licenseSecondary: The packages/bee-executor component is licensed under Apache License 2.0. See NOTICE and the component license files for details.
about.privacyLocalFirst: Local-first by default: backend services run on your device
about.privacyDataControl: You keep control of your code and data with explicit transport paths
about.starDescription: A Star helps more developers discover the project and join the community.

worktreeSection.title: Worktree Settings
worktreeSection.intro: Worktree is an isolated workspace for Agent task execution. Each task runs in its own branch and directory, remains isolated from others, and can be cleaned up after completion.
worktreeSection.workspaceDirHint: Leave empty to use default path: <repo>/.hive-worktrees/

skillsSection.saveHubDirError: Failed to save skills hub path
skillsSection.searchKeywordRequired: Please enter a keyword before searching
skillsSection.repoRequired: Please enter the skills repo first
skillsSection.skillNameRequired: Please input or select a skill name first
skillsSection.smartInputPlaceholder: Search skill names or paste a repository address
skillsSection.smartInputHelp: Search by skill keywords, or paste a full repository address (for example, vercel-labs/agent-skills) to browse all available skills
skillsSection.skillHelp: Select from the search results below, or enter the exact name from skills.sh
skillsSection.skillsShGuideDescription: Visit the official skills.sh library to explore community-contributed intelligent skills. Once you find what you need, copy the repository and skill name, then come back to install with one click.
skillsSection.candidateHint: Click "Search Skills" or "Browse Repo" above to discover available skills

remoteSection.loadStatusError: Failed to load remote access status
remoteSection.desktopTestDisabled: Remote access is disabled and cannot be tested
remoteSection.desktopTestSuccess: Remote service test passed: desktop is connected to relay
remoteSection.desktopTestNotReadyPrefix: Remote service is not ready, current status:
remoteSection.scanNotSupported: Camera scanning is not supported in current environment, paste QR content manually
remoteSection.cameraPermissionUnsupported: Current environment does not support camera permission request
remoteSection.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera permission denied, allow camera access in system settings
remoteSection.cameraUnavailable: Cannot access camera, please paste QR content manually
remoteSection.tunnelTestFailedNoSession: Tunnel test failed: session not established
remoteSection.tunnelTestFailedNeedConnect: Tunnel test failed: complete remote service connection first
remoteSection.tunnelTestSuccess: Tunnel test passed: desktop API reachable
remoteSection.tunnelTestFailedHttpPrefix: Tunnel test failed: desktop returned HTTP
remoteSection.tunnelTestFailedNoResponse: Tunnel test failed: no response from desktop (offline or timeout)
remoteSection.directTestFailedNetwork: Direct test failed, check IP, port, and network connectivity
remoteSection.qrContentPlaceholder: Paste bee://remote-access?... content and click parse

swarmSection.title: Swarm Config
swarmSection.description: Manage platform AI swarm templates for project creation. A swarm can inject Agent config, Skills, rule docs, and keep template source metadata.
swarmSection.emptyHint: Click "Add Swarm" to create the first swarm template
swarmSection.templateReactDescription: Suitable for frontend projects with common tools and MCP
swarmSection.templateNodeDescription: Agent combination for backend development tasks
swarmSection.cardInitPlanHint: These files and folders are copied when applying this swarm to a project
swarmSection.cardInitTemplateUnsupported: Template clone is not supported yet
swarmSection.previewAppliesOnProject: Swarm capabilities apply by scope during project creation or project settings
swarmSection.previewAgentVisualHint: This view is preview-only and does not modify swarm data

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.emptyProject: Please select a project from the sidebar first

basicInfo.projectDescriptionHint: Optional description to clarify project purpose

basicInfo.defaultSwarmHint: Default swarm configuration associated with this project

advanced.copyFilesHint: Files to copy from source repository after clone, such as .env or config files
